name: useOffsetPagination
description: Hook that defines the logic when pagination
examples: const { currentPage, currentPageSize, pageCount, isFirstPage, isLastPage, prev, next } = useOffsetPagination({ total: 100, initialPageSize: 10, initialPage: 1 });

source.source: * @param {UseOffsetPaginationOptions} options - The options for the hook

parameters.name: options.pageSize
parameters.description: - The number of items per page

source.source: * @param {number} [options.pageSize] - The number of items per page

tokens.name: [options.pageSize]
tokens.description: - The number of items per page

parameters.name: options.onChange
parameters.type: ({ page, pageSize }: { page: number; pageSize: number }) => void
parameters.description: - The callback function to be invoked when page changes

source.source: * @param {({ page, pageSize }: { page: number; pageSize: number }) => void} [options.onChange] - The callback function to be invoked when page changes

tokens.name: [options.onChange]
tokens.type: {({ page, pageSize }: { page: number; pageSize: number }) => void}
tokens.description: - The callback function to be invoked when page changes
